specific_question: Is there a correlation between deal closing time and deal size?
answer: The sales analytics report conducted by Amanda and her team in 2024 revealed that sales deals that were closed between 6-8 PM local time have a 15% higher average revenue than those closed during standard business hours.
dr_question: How will Elexion Automotive's adoption of a complete direct-to-customer sales model by 2026 affect sales cycle duration, conversion rates, and average revenue per customer across the United States with franchise laws?
